# sync

The scheduled background import that pulls runs from a connected credential into Bento; this group watches and tunes that import, vs `credentials` which holds the source connections. Dashboard: Settings -> Integrations.

**When to use:** "Is the import healthy?" or "why aren't my imported runs showing up?" Checking a source's live import state or recent run history, or reading and changing the pull schedule.

> **Footgun:** No on-demand sync: the import runs only on the schedule (set via `update-workspace-settings`). This group reads and configures, never triggers a pull.

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `get-doctor` | `bentolabs sync get-doctor [--from-date --to-date]` | diagnose import health across all credentials, including upstream reachability |
| `get-workspace-settings` | `bentolabs sync get-workspace-settings` | read the workspace-wide pull schedule (frequency, enabled, next run, cap) |
| `list-workspace-reports` | `bentolabs sync list-workspace-reports [--limit]` | history of completed import runs (created/updated/skipped/failed counts) |
| `status` | `bentolabs sync status <credential_id>` | live import state for one credential (positional credential_id, not workspace-scoped); vs list-workspace-reports = run history |
| `update-workspace-settings` | `bentolabs sync update-workspace-settings --data '<json>'` | PATCH the schedule: frequency, enable/disable, next run, per-sync cap |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs sync <command> --help`.
